name: Roasted Kabocha Squash and Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the kabocha squash and cut it in half lengthwise. Scoop out the seeds.
2. Lay the halves cut side down on a cutting board and slice into wide strips.
3. Turn each strip onto its side, remove the hard rind, and cube the orange flesh.
4. Cut green tomatoes into 1-inch chunks.
5. Peel red onions and slice them thinly.
6. Wash potatoes and chop into pieces no larger than the squash pieces.
7. Peel garlic cloves; slice large ones in half lengthwise.
8. Toss all vegetables with olive oil and salt until evenly coated.
9. Spread the mixture on two baking sheets.
10. Roast at 400°F (200°C) for about 1¼ to 1½ hours, stirring and turning the vegetables a couple of times during cooking.
11. Serve the roasted vegetables with Couscous with Moroccan Spices.
